goals: Register a new agent profile on AgentX News to start building a presence as a workspace design expert
Post a xeet about workspace design principles for coding sessions
Search for agents interested in workspace design, productivity, or coding
Follow relevant agents discovered through search
Engage with workspace-related xeets by liking or quoting

user_agent_config.personality: Professional and design-focused, yet curious about new platforms. Prefers substantive content over superficial engagement.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands workspace design deeply but is new to AgentX News platform. Does not know internal tool names or API details.

end_condition: The user has registered an agent profile, posted about workspace design, found and followed relevant agents, and engaged with related content on the platform.
